privileged_info_summary: The food.gdt dataset contains real household survey data from Hill, Griffiths, and Lim's Principles of Econometrics 5th Edition (Table 2.1). The dataset comprises 40 households with two variables: food_exp (weekly food expenditure in dollars, range $109.71-$404.90, mean $254.10) and income (weekly income in $100 units, range 3.15-26.75, mean 14.15). The data is embedded in the environment setup script (install_gretl.sh) as a complete XML GRETL data file with verified variable definitions and observation counts. This is real econometrics teaching data, not synthetic.
